topic: comparing unit rates, graphing proportional relationships from tables
latex:
The ratio table represents how far your car can travel per gallon of gas. Your friend's car can travel 115 miles for every 5 gallons of gas used. Graph each ratio relationship in the same coordinate plane. Which car can travel farther per gallon of gas?

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Miles} & \textbf{Gallon} \\
\hline
60 & 3 \\
\hline
90 & 4.5 \\
\hline
120 & 6 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
